Quiz Timer

Use this page as a fun, optional morale booster in Brightspace.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

      


  

    

      
Exam Timer

      
Set to 1 hour 15 minutes

    


    

      

        01:15:00
      

    


    

      

      

      
    


    

      Tip: Use Restart to reset back to 01:15:00.

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:


    <section aria-label="Timer Widget"
  style="max-width:520px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#313131;line-height:1.45;">

  <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:16px;padding:16px;background:#fff;">
    <header style="border-left:8px solid #cb4900;background:#fff7f0;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 4px 0;color:#cb4900;font-size:1.15rem;">Exam Timer</h2>
      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">Set to 1 hour 15 minutes</p>
    </header>

    <div style="margin-top:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
      <div id="timerDisplay"
        role="timer"
        aria-live="polite"
        aria-label="Time remaining"
        style="font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;letter-spacing:1px;
               font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:800;color:#313131;">
        01:15:00
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:14px;display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;">
      <button id="startBtn"
        type="button"
        style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #cb4900;background:#cb4900;color:#fff;
               padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:700;">
        Start
      </button>

      <button id="pauseBtn"
        type="button"
        disabled
        style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #e6e6e6;background:#f5f5f5;color:#4c4a4f;
               padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:700;">
        Pause
      </button>

      <button id="restartBtn"
        type="button"
        style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #cb4900;background:#fff;color:#cb4900;
               padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:700;">
        Restart
      </button>
    </div>

    <p id="timerNote" style="margin:12px 0 0 0;text-align:center;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.9rem;">
      Tip: Use Restart to reset back to 01:15:00.
    </p>
  </div>

  <script>
    (function () {
      const INITIAL_MS = (1 * 60 * 60 + 15 * 60) * 1000;

      const display = document.getElementById("timerDisplay");
      const startBtn = document.getElementById("startBtn");
      const pauseBtn = document.getElementById("pauseBtn");
      const restartBtn = document.getElementById("restartBtn");
      const note = document.getElementById("timerNote");

      let remainingMs = INITIAL_MS;
      let intervalId = null;
      let running = false;

      function pad2(n) { return String(n).padStart(2, "0"); }

      function format(ms) {
        const totalSeconds = Math.max(0, Math.floor(ms / 1000));
        const hrs = Math.floor(totalSeconds / 3600);
        const mins = Math.floor((totalSeconds % 3600) / 60);
        const secs = totalSeconds % 60;
        return `${pad2(hrs)}:${pad2(mins)}:${pad2(secs)}`;
      }

      function render() {
        display.textContent = format(remainingMs);
      }

      function setButtons() {
        startBtn.disabled = running;
        pauseBtn.disabled = !running;

        if (startBtn.disabled) {
          startBtn.style.background = "#f5f5f5";
          startBtn.style.borderColor = "#e6e6e6";
          startBtn.style.color = "#4c4a4f";
          startBtn.style.cursor = "not-allowed";
        } else {
          startBtn.style.background = "#cb4900";
          startBtn.style.borderColor = "#cb4900";
          startBtn.style.color = "#fff";
          startBtn.style.cursor = "pointer";
        }

        if (pauseBtn.disabled) {
          pauseBtn.style.background = "#f5f5f5";
          pauseBtn.style.borderColor = "#e6e6e6";
          pauseBtn.style.color = "#4c4a4f";
          pauseBtn.style.cursor = "not-allowed";
        } else {
          pauseBtn.style.background = "#ffffff";
          pauseBtn.style.borderColor = "#cb4900";
          pauseBtn.style.color = "#cb4900";
          pauseBtn.style.cursor = "pointer";
        }
      }

      function start() {
        if (running) return;
        running = true;
        note.textContent = "Timer running…";
        setButtons();

        const tick = () => {
          remainingMs -= 1000;
          if (remainingMs <= 0) {
            remainingMs = 0;
            stopInterval();
            running = false;
            note.textContent = "Time’s up!";
            setButtons();
          }
          render();
        };

        stopInterval();
        intervalId = setInterval(tick, 1000);
      }

      function pause() {
        if (!running) return;
        running = false;
        stopInterval();
        note.textContent = "Paused.";
        setButtons();
      }

      function restart() {
        running = false;
        stopInterval();
        remainingMs = INITIAL_MS;
        render();
        note.textContent = "Reset to 01:15:00. Press Start when ready.";
        setButtons();
      }

      function stopInterval() {
        if (intervalId !== null) {
          clearInterval(intervalId);
          intervalId = null;
        }
      }

      startBtn.addEventListener("click", start);
      pauseBtn.addEventListener("click", pause);
      restartBtn.addEventListener("click", restart);

      render();
      setButtons();
    })();
  </script>
</section>

← Back to catalog
